Therapeutics

Direct disease associations, biomarker-linked drugs, OSMF narrative-review natural agents, merged ranking, and clinical trial / literature evidence (top agents)

From opensourcemed.info/chronic-disease — Anxiety: a look at epidemiological factors and alternate treatments. Candidates for further study, not approved treatments.

DrugTypePhaseEvidence ScoreTrials & literatureSourcesLinks
CHEMBL12 Small molecule Approved Strong 105
No indexed hits

CT.gov search · Cochrane · PubMed

 ChEMBL ChEMBL Open Targets
LORAZEPAM Small molecule Approved Strong 105
8 trials 1 Cochrane 5 Meta-analysis 95 Trial pubs 60 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT02312739 — Nitrous Oxide for Pain Management During In-office Transcervical Sterilization (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT00613067 — ERP N1 as a Treatment Predictor of Generalized Anxiety Disorder (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT02305797 — EDG004 Treatment of Adult Patients With Generalized Anxiety Disorder (GAD) (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT00513565 — A Study To Investigate Effects Of GSK561679 On Brain Activation During Emotional Processing In Healthy Volunteers (COMPLETED) PHASE1
  • NCT05102331 — Lavender Oil Aromatherapy for The Treatment of Acute Anxiety During Bone Marrow Biopsy Procedures (WITHDRAWN) NA
  • NCT01441843 — Resistance Under the Microscope (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT01901003 — Sedative Premedication: Efficacy On Patient Experience (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT00624780 — Safety and Efficacy Evaluation Of Pregabalin (Lyrica) With Patients With Generalized Anxiety Disorder (COMPLETED) PHASE4

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Efficacy of drug treatments for generalised anxiety disorder: systematic review and meta-analysis (BMJ (Clinical research ed.), 2011)
  • Meta-analysis Pharmacologic predictors of benzodiazepine response trajectory in anxiety disorders: a Bayesian hierarchical modeling meta-analysis (CNS spectrums, 2023)
  • Meta-analysis Efficacy and safety of lavender essential oil (Silexan) capsules among patients suffering from anxiety disorders: A network meta-analysis (Scientific reports, 2019)
  • Meta-analysis An effect-size analysis of pharmacologic treatments for generalized anxiety disorder (Journal of psychopharmacology (Oxford, England), 2007)
  • Meta-analysis Benzodiazepines in generalized anxiety disorder: heterogeneity of outcomes based on a systematic review and meta-analysis of clinical trials (Journal of psychopharmacology (Oxford, England), 2007)
  • Clinical trial publication A randomized clinical trial of repeated doses of psilocybin for the treatment of obsessive-compulsive disorder (Journal of psychopharmacology (Oxford, England), 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Coadministration of disulfiram and lorazepam in the treatment of alcohol dependence and co-occurring anxiety disorder: an open-label pilot study (The American journal of drug and alcohol abuse, 2016)
  • Clinical trial publication Pregabalin long-term treatment and assessment of discontinuation in patients with generalized anxiety disorder (The international journal of neuropsychopharmacology, 2014)
  • Clinical trial publication Therapeutic effectiveness of Galphimia glauca vs. lorazepam in generalized anxiety disorder. A controlled 15-week clinical trial (Planta medica, 2012)
  • Clinical trial publication Evaluation of the effects of venlafaxine and pregabalin on the carbon dioxide inhalation models of Generalised Anxiety Disorder and panic (Journal of psychopharmacology (Oxford, England), 2013)
  • Randomized controlled trial Lack of efficacy of L-759274, a novel neurokinin 1 (substance P) receptor antagonist, for the treatment of generalized anxiety disorder (The international journal of neuropsychopharmacology, 2013)

CT.gov search · Cochrane · PubMed

 Open Targets, ChEMBL ChEMBL Open Targets
VENLAFAXINE HYDROCHLORIDE Small molecule Approved Strong 105
8 trials 2 Trial pubs 2 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT02012504 — Antidepressant Monotherapy on Depressive and Anxiety Symptom in Chinese Patients (UNKNOWN)
  • NCT04965272 — A Study To Assess Adverse Events and Change in Disease Activity With Oral Cariprazine When Added to Antidepressant Therapies (ADTs) Compared to Placebo in Adult Participants With Generalized Anxiety Disorder (GAD) Who Have Had an Inadequate Response to ADTs Alone (WITHDRAWN) PHASE2
  • NCT04396314 — Effectiveness of Basic Body Awareness Therapy in Post-traumatic Stress Disorders: A Randomized Clinical Trial (UNKNOWN) NA
  • NCT00592384 — Project to Improve Symptoms and Mood in People With Spinal Cord Injury (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT00238719 — Study Evaluating Venlafaxine ER in Children and Adolescents With Social Anxiety Disorder (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT00546923 — Study Evaluating Venlafaxine Extended-Release in Depressed and Anxious Patients (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT00122850 — A Comparison of Duloxetine Hydrochloride, Marketed Comparator, and Placebo in the Treatment of Generalized Anxiety Disorder (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT06659094 — Reducing Maximal Support in OCD: Efficacy of Stepped-Care Online CBT (COMPLETED) NA

Published literature

  • Clinical trial publication Time to relapse after 6 and 12 months' treatment of generalized anxiety disorder with venlafaxine extended release (Archives of general psychiatry, 2010)
  • Clinical trial publication Venlafaxine extended release vs placebo and paroxetine in social anxiety disorder (Archives of general psychiatry, 2005)

AMPHETAMINE Small molecule Approved Strong 100
8 trials 1 Meta-analysis 8 Trial pubs 2 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT05535101 — Non-invasive Brain Stimulation in Patients With Methamphetamine Use Disorder (UNKNOWN) NA
  • NCT04993300 — Repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation in Amphetamine Addiction (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT02008396 — Phase 2 Pilot Safety Study of MDMA-assisted Therapy for Social Anxiety in Autistic Adults (COMPLETED) PHASE2
  • NCT01863459 — Lisdexamfetamine Dimesylate in the Treatment of Adult ADHD With Anxiety Disorder Comorbidity (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT00363298 — Dextro-Amphetamine Versus Caffeine in Treatment-resistant OCD (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT00252174 — MDMA-assisted Therapy in People With Anxiety Related to Advanced Stage Cancer (TERMINATED) PHASE2
  • NCT02427568 — MDMA-Assisted Psychotherapy for Anxiety Associated With a Life-Threatening Illness (COMPLETED) PHASE2
  • NCT05138068 — Social Anxiety MDMA-Assisted Therapy Investigation (COMPLETED) PHASE2

Published literature

  • Meta-analysis Adverse drug events related to mood and emotion in paediatric patients treated for ADHD: A meta-analysis (Journal of affective disorders, 2018)
  • Clinical trial publication The mixed amphetamine salt extended release (Adderall XR, Max-XR) as an adjunctive to SSRIS or SNRIS in the treatment of adult ADHD patients with comorbid partially responsive generalized anxiety: an open-label study (Attention deficit and hyperactivity disorders, 2010)
  • Clinical trial publication Double-blind study of dextroamphetamine versus caffeine augmentation for treatment-resistant obsessive-compulsive disorder (The Journal of clinical psychiatry, 2009)
  • Clinical trial publication Mechanisms of dopaminergic and serotonergic neurotransmission in Tourette syndrome: clues from an in vivo neurochemistry study with PET (Neuropsychopharmacology : official publication of the American College of Neuropsychopharmacology, 2008)
  • Clinical trial publication Changes in EEG mean frequency associated with anxiety and with amphetamine challenge in BPD (Biological psychiatry, 1988)
  • Clinical trial publication A naturalistic study of imipramine in panic disorder and agoraphobia (The American journal of psychiatry, 1987)
  • Randomized controlled trial D-amphetamine in obsessive-compulsive disorder (Psychopharmacology, 1983)

NICOTINE Small molecule Approved Strong 100
8 trials 7 Meta-analysis 32 Trial pubs 29 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT07499219 — Preliminary Testing and Development of a Short Digital Intervention for Patients on Waiting Lists for Psychological Treatment (ENROLLING_BY_INVITATION) NA
  • NCT03904186 — Effectiveness of an Integrated Treatment to Address Smoking Cessation and Anxiety/ Depression in People Living With HIV (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT01393301 — Integrated Treatment for Smoking Cessation & Anxiety in People With HIV (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT07024992 — Enhancing Smoking Cessation for African American People Everywhere (NOT_YET_RECRUITING) PHASE2
  • NCT06957925 — ABC School Intervention Among Ugandan Adolescents (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT05376397 — Testing THRIVE 365 for Black Sexual Minority Men (On The Daily) (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT04481373 — Targeting HIV Retention and Improved Viral Load Through Engagement ('THRIVE') (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT04143243 — One-day Life Skills Workshop for Veterans With TBI, Pain, and Psychopathology: Evaluating Efficacy and Mechanism of Change (COMPLETED) NA

Published literature

  • Meta-analysis Psychiatric morbidity and gambling disorder: A systematic review and meta-analysis of population-based surveys (European psychiatry : the journal of the Association of European Psychiatrists, 2025)
  • Meta-analysis Symptom Provocation and Clinical Response to Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis (JAMA psychiatry, 2025)
  • Meta-analysis Global prevalence of smoking among individuals with obsessive-compulsive disorder and symptoms: a systematic review and meta-analysis (Health psychology review, 2023)
  • Meta-analysis Childhood Psychiatric Disorders as Risk Factor for Subsequent Substance Abuse: A Meta-Analysis (Journal of the American Academy of Child and Adolescent Psychiatry, 2017)
  • Meta-analysis Prevalence of psychiatric co-morbidity in treatment-seeking problem gamblers: A systematic review and meta-analysis (The Australian and New Zealand journal of psychiatry, 2015)
  • Systematic review A systematic review of virtual reality therapies for substance use disorders: Impact on secondary treatment outcomes (The American journal on addictions, 2023)
  • Systematic review A systematic review of suicide and suicide attempts in adolescents with psychotic disorders (Schizophrenia research, 2021)
  • Clinical trial publication Personalized chat-based support for smoking cessation among smokers with mental health symptoms in the workplace: A randomized controlled trial (Addiction (Abingdon, England), 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Subjective experiences, contexts, and risk perceptions of very low nicotine content cigarettes and electronic cigarettes among people with depression and anxiety disorders who smoke (Drug and alcohol dependence, 2023)
  • Clinical trial publication The effects of reduced nicotine content cigarettes on biomarkers of nicotine and toxicant exposure, smoking behavior and psychiatric symptoms in smokers with mood or anxiety disorders: A double-blind randomized trial (PloS one, 2022)
  • Clinical trial publication Community-based smoking cessation treatment for adults with high anxiety sensitivity: a randomized clinical trial (Addiction (Abingdon, England), 2021)
  • Clinical trial publication A double-blind randomized clinical trial of high frequency rTMS over the DLPFC on nicotine dependence, anxiety and depression (Scientific reports, 2021)

Ashwagandha OSMF review Herbal Preclinical Emerging 30
5 trials 2 Cochrane 1 Meta-analysis 2 Trial pubs 2 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT06235177 — Psychoneuromentalism Disorder: A Medical Condition That Affects People With Psychological Impairments From Health Issues (NOT_YET_RECRUITING) EARLY_PHASE1
  • NCT06714942 — Efficacy and Safety of a Proprietary Blend of Ashwagandha Root Extract (Aqueous) in Adult Men and Women With High Stress and Anxiety: A Randomized, Double-blind, Three-arm, Parallel, Placebo-controlled Study (RECRUITING) NA
  • NCT07441070 — Effect of Ashwagandha Root Extract on Stress, Anxiety, and Sleep Quality in Adults Experiencing Minority Stress (RECRUITING) NA
  • NCT01311180 — A Clinical Trial to Study the Effects of Sensoril® for Patients With Generalized Anxiety Disorder (COMPLETED) PHASE2
  • NCT05684991 — Prospective, Multi Centric, Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled Study to Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of KSM-66 Ashwagandha (Withania Somnifera) in Adults Experiencing High Stress and/or Anxiety (UNKNOWN) NA

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Medicinal Plants for Insomnia Related to Anxiety: An Updated Review (Planta medica, 2021)
  • Cochrane review GABA-modulating phytomedicines for anxiety: A systematic review of preclinical and clinical evidence (Phytotherapy research : PTR, 2018)
  • Meta-analysis Does Ashwagandha supplementation have a beneficial effect on the management of anxiety and stress? A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials (Phytotherapy research : PTR, 2022)
  • Systematic review Interventions for generalized anxiety disorder (Current opinion in psychiatry, 2023)
  • Systematic review An alternative treatment for anxiety: a systematic review of human trial results reported for the Ayurvedic herb ashwagandha (Withania somnifera) (Journal of alternative and complementary medicine (New York, N.Y.), 2014)
  • Clinical trial publication A standardized Ashwagandha root extract alleviates stress, anxiety, and improves quality of life in healthy adults by modulating stress hormones: Results from a randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled study (Medicine, 2023)
  • Clinical trial publication Evaluation of the efficacy of Withania somnifera (Ashwagandha) root extract in patients with obsessive-compulsive disorder: A randomized double-blind placebo-controlled trial (Complementary therapies in medicine, 2016)

7 trials 1 Cochrane 1 Meta-analysis 4 Trial pubs 3 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT07319117 — Evaluation of the Impact of a Nutritional Formulation on Cognitive Performance Following Stress Exposure. (RECRUITING) NA
  • NCT07135232 — The Effects of Resistance Training and a Plant-Based Supplement on Perimenopausal Symptoms and Muscle Health. (RECRUITING) NA
  • NCT06505694 — A Clinical Trial to Assess the Impact of an Alcohol Alternative Herbal Tincture on Signs of Stress Anxiety and Sleep Quality. (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT07076537 — A Clinical Study on the Effects of a Dietary Supplement on Stress, Anxiety, Mood and Sleep in a Pediatric Population (NOT_YET_RECRUITING) NA
  • NCT05857956 — A Clinical Trial to Assess the Efficacy of a Plant-based Energy Shot on Focus and ADHD-like Symptoms (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT00291070 — Effects of L-Theanine in Boys With ADHD (COMPLETED) PHASE2
  • NCT07665840 — Effects of L-Theanine and Hericium Erinaceus Gummies on Psychological, Cognitive, and Sleep Quality in University Students (COMPLETED) NA

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Medicinal herbs for the treatment of anxiety: A systematic review and network meta-analysis (Pharmacological research, 2022)
  • Clinical trial publication L-theanine combination therapy with fluvoxamine in moderate-to-severe obsessive-compulsive disorder: A placebo-controlled, double-blind, randomized trial (Psychiatry and clinical neurosciences, 2023)
  • Clinical trial publication Use of Nutritional Supplements Based on L-Theanine and Vitamin B6 in Children with Tourette Syndrome, with Anxiety Disorders: A Pilot Study (Nutrients, 2022)
  • Clinical trial publication L-theanine in the adjunctive treatment of generalized anxiety disorder: A double-blind, randomised, placebo-controlled trial (Journal of psychiatric research, 2019)
  • Clinical trial publication Relaxation and immunity enhancement effects of gamma-aminobutyric acid (GABA) administration in humans (BioFactors (Oxford, England), 2006)

Lavender oil OSMF review Herbal Preclinical Emerging 30
8 trials 1 Cochrane 4 Meta-analysis 5 Trial pubs 5 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT06066073 — "Pain and Emotional Changes on Relationships Between Anxiety and Olfaction" (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT06949293 — The Effect of Classical Hand Massage, Lavender Inhalation and Hand Massage With Lavender on Anxiety, Pain and Comfort (ACTIVE_NOT_RECRUITING) NA
  • NCT05369936 — Pain Perception: on Relationships Between Dental Anxiety and Olfaction (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT01809067 — The Effects of Lavender Aromatherapy on Reducing Stress and Anxiety During MRI Procedures. (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT06769503 — Effect of Aromatherapy on Anxiety in Relatives of Emergency Patients. (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT06241495 — Aromatherapy in Providing a Semen Sample (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT06598904 — The Effect of Aromatherapy for First Dental Visit Patients (NOT_YET_RECRUITING) NA
  • NCT06045078 — Aromatherapy in Total Knee Replacement (COMPLETED) NA

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Effects of lavender on anxiety: A systematic review and meta-analysis (Phytomedicine : international journal of phytotherapy and phytopharmacology, 2019)
  • Meta-analysis How Strong is the Evidence for the Anxiolytic Efficacy of Lavender?: Systematic Review and Meta-analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials (Asian nursing research, 2019)
  • Meta-analysis Efficacy of Silexan in subthreshold anxiety: meta-analysis of randomised, placebo-controlled trials (European archives of psychiatry and clinical neuroscience, 2019)
  • Meta-analysis Lavender Oil Preparation (Silexan) for Treating Anxiety: An Updated Meta-Analysis (Journal of clinical psychopharmacology, 2017)
  • Clinical trial publication The Effect of Precolonoscopy Lavender Inhalation on Patient Anxiety and Comfort: A Randomized, Controlled, Double-Blinded, Single-Center Study (Gastroenterology nursing : the official journal of the Society of Gastroenterology Nurses and Associates, 2023)
  • Clinical trial publication Silexan does not cause withdrawal symptoms even when abruptly discontinued (International journal of psychiatry in clinical practice, 2017)
  • Clinical trial publication Lavender oil preparation Silexan is effective in generalized anxiety disorder--a randomized, double-blind comparison to placebo and paroxetine (The international journal of neuropsychopharmacology, 2014)
  • Clinical trial publication Silexan, an orally administered Lavandula oil preparation, is effective in the treatment of 'subsyndromal' anxiety disorder: a randomized, double-blind, placebo controlled trial (International clinical psychopharmacology, 2010)
  • Clinical trial publication A multi-center, double-blind, randomised study of the Lavender oil preparation Silexan in comparison to Lorazepam for generalized anxiety disorder (Phytomedicine : international journal of phytotherapy and phytopharmacology, 2010)

  • Clinical trial publication Effect of crocin versus fluoxetine in treatment of mild to moderate obsessive-compulsive disorder: A double blind randomized clinical trial (Human psychopharmacology, 2021)
  • Clinical trial publication affron(®), a standardised extract from saffron (Crocus sativus L.) for the treatment of youth anxiety and depressive symptoms: A randomised, double-blind, placebo-controlled study (Journal of affective disorders, 2018)

  • NCT00624780 — Safety and Efficacy Evaluation Of Pregabalin (Lyrica) With Patients With Generalized Anxiety Disorder (COMPLETED) PHASE4

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Efficacy of drug treatments for generalised anxiety disorder: systematic review and meta-analysis (BMJ (Clinical research ed.), 2011)
  • Meta-analysis Pharmacologic predictors of benzodiazepine response trajectory in anxiety disorders: a Bayesian hierarchical modeling meta-analysis (CNS spectrums, 2023)
  • Meta-analysis Efficacy and safety of lavender essential oil (Silexan) capsules among patients suffering from anxiety disorders: A network meta-analysis (Scientific reports, 2019)
  • Meta-analysis An effect-size analysis of pharmacologic treatments for generalized anxiety disorder (Journal of psychopharmacology (Oxford, England), 2007)
  • Meta-analysis Benzodiazepines in generalized anxiety disorder: heterogeneity of outcomes based on a systematic review and meta-analysis of clinical trials (Journal of psychopharmacology (Oxford, England), 2007)
  • Clinical trial publication A randomized clinical trial of repeated doses of psilocybin for the treatment of obsessive-compulsive disorder (Journal of psychopharmacology (Oxford, England), 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Coadministration of disulfiram and lorazepam in the treatment of alcohol dependence and co-occurring anxiety disorder: an open-label pilot study (The American journal of drug and alcohol abuse, 2016)
  • Clinical trial publication Pregabalin long-term treatment and assessment of discontinuation in patients with generalized anxiety disorder (The international journal of neuropsychopharmacology, 2014)
  • Clinical trial publication Therapeutic effectiveness of Galphimia glauca vs. lorazepam in generalized anxiety disorder. A controlled 15-week clinical trial (Planta medica, 2012)
  • Clinical trial publication Evaluation of the effects of venlafaxine and pregabalin on the carbon dioxide inhalation models of Generalised Anxiety Disorder and panic (Journal of psychopharmacology (Oxford, England), 2013)
  • Randomized controlled trial Lack of efficacy of L-759274, a novel neurokinin 1 (substance P) receptor antagonist, for the treatment of generalized anxiety disorder (The international journal of neuropsychopharmacology, 2013)

Published literature

  • Meta-analysis Adverse drug events related to mood and emotion in paediatric patients treated for ADHD: A meta-analysis (Journal of affective disorders, 2018)
  • Clinical trial publication The mixed amphetamine salt extended release (Adderall XR, Max-XR) as an adjunctive to SSRIS or SNRIS in the treatment of adult ADHD patients with comorbid partially responsive generalized anxiety: an open-label study (Attention deficit and hyperactivity disorders, 2010)

  • Clinical trial publication Changes in EEG mean frequency associated with anxiety and with amphetamine challenge in BPD (Biological psychiatry, 1988)
  • Clinical trial publication A naturalistic study of imipramine in panic disorder and agoraphobia (The American journal of psychiatry, 1987)
  • Randomized controlled trial D-amphetamine in obsessive-compulsive disorder (Psychopharmacology, 1983)

  • NCT07499219 — Preliminary Testing and Development of a Short Digital Intervention for Patients on Waiting Lists for Psychological Treatment (ENROLLING_BY_INVITATION) NA
  • NCT03904186 — Effectiveness of an Integrated Treatment to Address Smoking Cessation and Anxiety/ Depression in People Living With HIV (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT01393301 — Integrated Treatment for Smoking Cessation & Anxiety in People With HIV (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT07024992 — Enhancing Smoking Cessation for African American People Everywhere (NOT_YET_RECRUITING) PHASE2
  • NCT06957925 — ABC School Intervention Among Ugandan Adolescents (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT05376397 — Testing THRIVE 365 for Black Sexual Minority Men (On The Daily) (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT04481373 — Targeting HIV Retention and Improved Viral Load Through Engagement ('THRIVE') (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT04143243 — One-day Life Skills Workshop for Veterans With TBI, Pain, and Psychopathology: Evaluating Efficacy and Mechanism of Change (COMPLETED) NA

Published literature

  • Meta-analysis Psychiatric morbidity and gambling disorder: A systematic review and meta-analysis of population-based surveys (European psychiatry : the journal of the Association of European Psychiatrists, 2025)
  • Meta-analysis Symptom Provocation and Clinical Response to Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis (JAMA psychiatry, 2025)
  • Meta-analysis Global prevalence of smoking among individuals with obsessive-compulsive disorder and symptoms: a systematic review and meta-analysis (Health psychology review, 2023)
  • Meta-analysis Childhood Psychiatric Disorders as Risk Factor for Subsequent Substance Abuse: A Meta-Analysis (Journal of the American Academy of Child and Adolescent Psychiatry, 2017)
  • Meta-analysis Prevalence of psychiatric co-morbidity in treatment-seeking problem gamblers: A systematic review and meta-analysis (The Australian and New Zealand journal of psychiatry, 2015)
  • Systematic review A systematic review of virtual reality therapies for substance use disorders: Impact on secondary treatment outcomes (The American journal on addictions, 2023)
  • Systematic review A systematic review of suicide and suicide attempts in adolescents with psychotic disorders (Schizophrenia research, 2021)
  • Clinical trial publication Personalized chat-based support for smoking cessation among smokers with mental health symptoms in the workplace: A randomized controlled trial (Addiction (Abingdon, England), 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Subjective experiences, contexts, and risk perceptions of very low nicotine content cigarettes and electronic cigarettes among people with depression and anxiety disorders who smoke (Drug and alcohol dependence, 2023)
  • Clinical trial publication The effects of reduced nicotine content cigarettes on biomarkers of nicotine and toxicant exposure, smoking behavior and psychiatric symptoms in smokers with mood or anxiety disorders: A double-blind randomized trial (PloS one, 2022)
  • Clinical trial publication Community-based smoking cessation treatment for adults with high anxiety sensitivity: a randomized clinical trial (Addiction (Abingdon, England), 2021)
  • Clinical trial publication A double-blind randomized clinical trial of high frequency rTMS over the DLPFC on nicotine dependence, anxiety and depression (Scientific reports, 2021)

Registry trials

  • NCT05535101 — Non-invasive Brain Stimulation in Patients With Methamphetamine Use Disorder (UNKNOWN) NA
  • NCT04993300 — Repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation in Amphetamine Addiction (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT02008396 — Phase 2 Pilot Safety Study of MDMA-assisted Therapy for Social Anxiety in Autistic Adults (COMPLETED) PHASE2
  • NCT01863459 — Lisdexamfetamine Dimesylate in the Treatment of Adult ADHD With Anxiety Disorder Comorbidity (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT00363298 — Dextro-Amphetamine Versus Caffeine in Treatment-resistant OCD (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT00252174 — MDMA-assisted Therapy in People With Anxiety Related to Advanced Stage Cancer (TERMINATED) PHASE2
  • NCT02427568 — MDMA-Assisted Psychotherapy for Anxiety Associated With a Life-Threatening Illness (COMPLETED) PHASE2
  • NCT05138068 — Social Anxiety MDMA-Assisted Therapy Investigation (COMPLETED) PHASE2

Published literature

  • Meta-analysis Adverse drug events related to mood and emotion in paediatric patients treated for ADHD: A meta-analysis (Journal of affective disorders, 2018)
  • Clinical trial publication The mixed amphetamine salt extended release (Adderall XR, Max-XR) as an adjunctive to SSRIS or SNRIS in the treatment of adult ADHD patients with comorbid partially responsive generalized anxiety: an open-label study (Attention deficit and hyperactivity disorders, 2010)
  • Clinical trial publication Double-blind study of dextroamphetamine versus caffeine augmentation for treatment-resistant obsessive-compulsive disorder (The Journal of clinical psychiatry, 2009)
  • Clinical trial publication Mechanisms of dopaminergic and serotonergic neurotransmission in Tourette syndrome: clues from an in vivo neurochemistry study with PET (Neuropsychopharmacology : official publication of the American College of Neuropsychopharmacology, 2008)
  • Clinical trial publication Changes in EEG mean frequency associated with anxiety and with amphetamine challenge in BPD (Biological psychiatry, 1988)
  • Clinical trial publication A naturalistic study of imipramine in panic disorder and agoraphobia (The American journal of psychiatry, 1987)
  • Randomized controlled trial D-amphetamine in obsessive-compulsive disorder (Psychopharmacology, 1983)

View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT07499219 — Preliminary Testing and Development of a Short Digital Intervention for Patients on Waiting Lists for Psychological Treatment (ENROLLING_BY_INVITATION) NA
  • NCT03904186 — Effectiveness of an Integrated Treatment to Address Smoking Cessation and Anxiety/ Depression in People Living With HIV (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT01393301 — Integrated Treatment for Smoking Cessation & Anxiety in People With HIV (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT07024992 — Enhancing Smoking Cessation for African American People Everywhere (NOT_YET_RECRUITING) PHASE2
  • NCT06957925 — ABC School Intervention Among Ugandan Adolescents (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT05376397 — Testing THRIVE 365 for Black Sexual Minority Men (On The Daily) (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT04481373 — Targeting HIV Retention and Improved Viral Load Through Engagement ('THRIVE') (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT04143243 — One-day Life Skills Workshop for Veterans With TBI, Pain, and Psychopathology: Evaluating Efficacy and Mechanism of Change (COMPLETED) NA

Published literature

  • Meta-analysis Psychiatric morbidity and gambling disorder: A systematic review and meta-analysis of population-based surveys (European psychiatry : the journal of the Association of European Psychiatrists, 2025)
  • Meta-analysis Symptom Provocation and Clinical Response to Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis (JAMA psychiatry, 2025)
  • Meta-analysis Global prevalence of smoking among individuals with obsessive-compulsive disorder and symptoms: a systematic review and meta-analysis (Health psychology review, 2023)
  • Meta-analysis Childhood Psychiatric Disorders as Risk Factor for Subsequent Substance Abuse: A Meta-Analysis (Journal of the American Academy of Child and Adolescent Psychiatry, 2017)
  • Meta-analysis Prevalence of psychiatric co-morbidity in treatment-seeking problem gamblers: A systematic review and meta-analysis (The Australian and New Zealand journal of psychiatry, 2015)
  • Systematic review A systematic review of virtual reality therapies for substance use disorders: Impact on secondary treatment outcomes (The American journal on addictions, 2023)
  • Systematic review A systematic review of suicide and suicide attempts in adolescents with psychotic disorders (Schizophrenia research, 2021)
  • Clinical trial publication Personalized chat-based support for smoking cessation among smokers with mental health symptoms in the workplace: A randomized controlled trial (Addiction (Abingdon, England), 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Subjective experiences, contexts, and risk perceptions of very low nicotine content cigarettes and electronic cigarettes among people with depression and anxiety disorders who smoke (Drug and alcohol dependence, 2023)
  • Clinical trial publication The effects of reduced nicotine content cigarettes on biomarkers of nicotine and toxicant exposure, smoking behavior and psychiatric symptoms in smokers with mood or anxiety disorders: A double-blind randomized trial (PloS one, 2022)
  • Clinical trial publication Community-based smoking cessation treatment for adults with high anxiety sensitivity: a randomized clinical trial (Addiction (Abingdon, England), 2021)
  • Clinical trial publication A double-blind randomized clinical trial of high frequency rTMS over the DLPFC on nicotine dependence, anxiety and depression (Scientific reports, 2021)

Ashwagandha OSMF review Herbal Preclinical Emerging 30
5 trials 2 Cochrane 1 Meta-analysis 2 Trial pubs 2 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT06235177 — Psychoneuromentalism Disorder: A Medical Condition That Affects People With Psychological Impairments From Health Issues (NOT_YET_RECRUITING) EARLY_PHASE1
  • NCT06714942 — Efficacy and Safety of a Proprietary Blend of Ashwagandha Root Extract (Aqueous) in Adult Men and Women With High Stress and Anxiety: A Randomized, Double-blind, Three-arm, Parallel, Placebo-controlled Study (RECRUITING) NA
  • NCT07441070 — Effect of Ashwagandha Root Extract on Stress, Anxiety, and Sleep Quality in Adults Experiencing Minority Stress (RECRUITING) NA
  • NCT01311180 — A Clinical Trial to Study the Effects of Sensoril® for Patients With Generalized Anxiety Disorder (COMPLETED) PHASE2
  • NCT05684991 — Prospective, Multi Centric, Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled Study to Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of KSM-66 Ashwagandha (Withania Somnifera) in Adults Experiencing High Stress and/or Anxiety (UNKNOWN) NA

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Medicinal Plants for Insomnia Related to Anxiety: An Updated Review (Planta medica, 2021)
  • Cochrane review GABA-modulating phytomedicines for anxiety: A systematic review of preclinical and clinical evidence (Phytotherapy research : PTR, 2018)
  • Meta-analysis Does Ashwagandha supplementation have a beneficial effect on the management of anxiety and stress? A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials (Phytotherapy research : PTR, 2022)
  • Systematic review Interventions for generalized anxiety disorder (Current opinion in psychiatry, 2023)
  • Systematic review An alternative treatment for anxiety: a systematic review of human trial results reported for the Ayurvedic herb ashwagandha (Withania somnifera) (Journal of alternative and complementary medicine (New York, N.Y.), 2014)
  • Clinical trial publication A standardized Ashwagandha root extract alleviates stress, anxiety, and improves quality of life in healthy adults by modulating stress hormones: Results from a randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled study (Medicine, 2023)
  • Clinical trial publication Evaluation of the efficacy of Withania somnifera (Ashwagandha) root extract in patients with obsessive-compulsive disorder: A randomized double-blind placebo-controlled trial (Complementary therapies in medicine, 2016)

L-Theanine OSMF review Supplement Preclinical Emerging 30
7 trials 1 Cochrane 1 Meta-analysis 4 Trial pubs 3 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT07319117 — Evaluation of the Impact of a Nutritional Formulation on Cognitive Performance Following Stress Exposure. (RECRUITING) NA
  • NCT07135232 — The Effects of Resistance Training and a Plant-Based Supplement on Perimenopausal Symptoms and Muscle Health. (RECRUITING) NA
  • NCT06505694 — A Clinical Trial to Assess the Impact of an Alcohol Alternative Herbal Tincture on Signs of Stress Anxiety and Sleep Quality. (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT07076537 — A Clinical Study on the Effects of a Dietary Supplement on Stress, Anxiety, Mood and Sleep in a Pediatric Population (NOT_YET_RECRUITING) NA
  • NCT05857956 — A Clinical Trial to Assess the Efficacy of a Plant-based Energy Shot on Focus and ADHD-like Symptoms (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT00291070 — Effects of L-Theanine in Boys With ADHD (COMPLETED) PHASE2
  • NCT07665840 — Effects of L-Theanine and Hericium Erinaceus Gummies on Psychological, Cognitive, and Sleep Quality in University Students (COMPLETED) NA

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Medicinal herbs for the treatment of anxiety: A systematic review and network meta-analysis (Pharmacological research, 2022)
  • Clinical trial publication L-theanine combination therapy with fluvoxamine in moderate-to-severe obsessive-compulsive disorder: A placebo-controlled, double-blind, randomized trial (Psychiatry and clinical neurosciences, 2023)
  • Clinical trial publication Use of Nutritional Supplements Based on L-Theanine and Vitamin B6 in Children with Tourette Syndrome, with Anxiety Disorders: A Pilot Study (Nutrients, 2022)
  • Clinical trial publication L-theanine in the adjunctive treatment of generalized anxiety disorder: A double-blind, randomised, placebo-controlled trial (Journal of psychiatric research, 2019)
  • Clinical trial publication Relaxation and immunity enhancement effects of gamma-aminobutyric acid (GABA) administration in humans (BioFactors (Oxford, England), 2006)

Lavender oil OSMF review Herbal Preclinical Emerging 30
8 trials 1 Cochrane 4 Meta-analysis 5 Trial pubs 5 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT06066073 — "Pain and Emotional Changes on Relationships Between Anxiety and Olfaction" (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT06949293 — The Effect of Classical Hand Massage, Lavender Inhalation and Hand Massage With Lavender on Anxiety, Pain and Comfort (ACTIVE_NOT_RECRUITING) NA
  • NCT05369936 — Pain Perception: on Relationships Between Dental Anxiety and Olfaction (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT01809067 — The Effects of Lavender Aromatherapy on Reducing Stress and Anxiety During MRI Procedures. (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT06769503 — Effect of Aromatherapy on Anxiety in Relatives of Emergency Patients. (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT06241495 — Aromatherapy in Providing a Semen Sample (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT06598904 — The Effect of Aromatherapy for First Dental Visit Patients (NOT_YET_RECRUITING) NA
  • NCT06045078 — Aromatherapy in Total Knee Replacement (COMPLETED) NA

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Effects of lavender on anxiety: A systematic review and meta-analysis (Phytomedicine : international journal of phytotherapy and phytopharmacology, 2019)
  • Meta-analysis How Strong is the Evidence for the Anxiolytic Efficacy of Lavender?: Systematic Review and Meta-analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials (Asian nursing research, 2019)
  • Meta-analysis Efficacy of Silexan in subthreshold anxiety: meta-analysis of randomised, placebo-controlled trials (European archives of psychiatry and clinical neuroscience, 2019)
  • Meta-analysis Lavender Oil Preparation (Silexan) for Treating Anxiety: An Updated Meta-Analysis (Journal of clinical psychopharmacology, 2017)
  • Clinical trial publication The Effect of Precolonoscopy Lavender Inhalation on Patient Anxiety and Comfort: A Randomized, Controlled, Double-Blinded, Single-Center Study (Gastroenterology nursing : the official journal of the Society of Gastroenterology Nurses and Associates, 2023)
  • Clinical trial publication Silexan does not cause withdrawal symptoms even when abruptly discontinued (International journal of psychiatry in clinical practice, 2017)
  • Clinical trial publication Lavender oil preparation Silexan is effective in generalized anxiety disorder--a randomized, double-blind comparison to placebo and paroxetine (The international journal of neuropsychopharmacology, 2014)
  • Clinical trial publication Silexan, an orally administered Lavandula oil preparation, is effective in the treatment of 'subsyndromal' anxiety disorder: a randomized, double-blind, placebo controlled trial (International clinical psychopharmacology, 2010)
  • Clinical trial publication A multi-center, double-blind, randomised study of the Lavender oil preparation Silexan in comparison to Lorazepam for generalized anxiety disorder (Phytomedicine : international journal of phytotherapy and phytopharmacology, 2010)

Alterations and therapeutics are aggregated from public databases (Open Targets, HPO, ChEMBL, DGIdb, and others). Natural agents are candidates from OSMF narrative reviews on opensourcemed.info/chronic-disease.html — not approved treatments. This page is for research orientation only — not medical advice.
